options.name: -all_lib
options.description: Option returns a list of dd object handles for list of libraries present in cds.lib file.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Option requires a libName and cellName.

options.name: -cellview
options.description: Option requires a libName cellName and viewName.

options.name: -children
options.description: Operator gives the ddObject handles of children in a given dd object handle.

options.name: -dd
options.description: Option requires a single dd object handle.

options.name: -file
options.description: Operator gives the ddObject handles of all files in a given dd object handle.

options.name: -name
options.description: Operator gives the name of given dd object handle.

options.name: -path
options.description: Operator gives the absolute path(i.e ddpath) of a given dd object handle.

options.name: -type
options.description: Operator gives the type of given dd object handle.
